preferredTitle: Perturb-LM: Leakage-Aware Language Retrieval of Cell Painting Morphology
shortDescription: A leakage-aware benchmark for aligning natural-language descriptions of biological perturbations with Cell Painting morphology profiles.
researchQuestion: Can frozen biomedical language representations retrieve perturbation-induced cellular morphology better than strong identifier-stripped lexical controls?
hypothesis: Frozen biomedical language representations contain enough mechanistic information to support retrieval of perturbation-induced morphology after lightweight alignment, but success must be demonstrated against identifier-stripped lexical controls under held-out and leakage-aware evaluation.
syntheticDisclaimer: Illustrative interface demo — not real model output
currentClaimStatus: Benchmark foundation validated; biological retrieval and learned-model superiority are not established.

methodComparison.label: Random
methodComparison.note: Uniform random ranking control from the corrected full-query baseline.

methodComparison.label: Identifier-stripped TF-IDF
methodComparison.note: Primary lexical baseline over identifier-stripped query text.

methodComparison.label: Frozen BiomedBERT embeddings
methodComparison.note: Pending real experiment. No score is shown until the run completes.

methodComparison.label: Frozen embeddings + linear projection
methodComparison.note: Pending real experiment. Requires frozen embeddings and train-only fitting.

methodComparison.label: Replicate-consensus alignment
methodComparison.note: Planned ablation. No consensus-model score exists yet.

methodComparison.label: Held-out batch evaluation
methodComparison.note: Unavailable until a second compatible batch is integrated.

researchStatus.label: Foundation
researchStatus.detail: Pipeline scaffold, preprocessing, query construction, and public-copy consistency are validated.

researchStatus.label: Lexical benchmark
researchStatus.detail: Identifier-stripped TF-IDF baseline completed with query-bootstrap CI.

researchStatus.label: Real encoder run
researchStatus.detail: BiomedBERT is selected and pinned; frozen embeddings have not produced benchmark results.

researchStatus.label: Linear projection result
researchStatus.detail: Regularized text-to-profile projection results remain pending.

researchStatus.label: Held-out batch
researchStatus.detail: The current local dataset has one inferred batch; batch generalization cannot be claimed.

researchStatus.label: Live model integration
researchStatus.detail: No live model is served by the public prototype.

splitReadiness.label: Held-out plate
splitReadiness.detail: Configured for split-specific evaluation with independently reported query counts.

splitReadiness.label: Held-out treatment
splitReadiness.detail: Configured for unseen-treatment evaluation without train/test treatment overlap.

splitReadiness.label: Exclude same plate and well
splitReadiness.detail: Strict combined filter for leakage-aware ranking.

leakageControls: Treatment identifiers are removed from identifier-stripped text.
Target sequences are prohibited from query construction.
Plate, well, and batch identifiers are excluded from public query text.
Preprocessing and model fitting must use training data only.
Every split/filter must report its own evaluable-query count.
Public reports expose aggregate metrics only, not row-level CPJUMP1 records.

roadmap.label: Frozen BiomedBERT baseline
roadmap.detail: Run frozen embeddings against the benchmark and report leakage-aware metrics.

roadmap.label: Regularized linear projection
roadmap.detail: Fit a small projection with train-only preprocessing and held-out evaluation.

roadmap.label: Replicate-consensus profiles
roadmap.detail: Compare individual profile targets to mean or median perturbation consensus targets.

roadmap.label: Hard-negative-ready evaluation
roadmap.detail: Prepare biologically related but label-distinct comparison groups.

roadmap.label: Second-batch harmonization
roadmap.detail: Integrate a compatible batch before making batch-generalization claims.

roadmap.label: Representative image linkage
roadmap.detail: Future qualitative inspection only; current benchmark remains profile-based.

knownLimitations: The real biomedical text-alignment experiment has not started.
The additional profile plate changes the feature schema and is only a compatibility investigation.
The current benchmark is text-to-morphology-profile retrieval, not validated text-to-image retrieval.
nextExperiment: Freeze a biomedical text encoder and train a small regularized linear projection into the 904-feature morphology-profile space, then evaluate against identifier-stripped TF-IDF under held-out and leakage-aware splits.
